subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast kindled the fire of love from the Divine Lote-Tree! Verily, the Tree of the Covenant hath been planted in the midst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اقتبس نار المحبه من السدره الرحمانیه قد غرست شجره المیثاق فی بحبوحه
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @elections
